title: Berlin Before Hotel Check-In - Quick Summary
items: **Solve luggage before sightseeing.** If your Berlin room is not ready, ask the hotel about bag storage first.
**Do not assume early check-in and luggage storage are the same thing.** A room may be unavailable while reception can still hold bags.
**Use station lockers, city luggage storage or BER baggage storage only when they fit your route.** Do not create a second airport trip just to collect a suitcase.
**Keep the first plan small:** food, one nearby walk, one simple sight and a return buffer are better than a cross-city checklist.
**If you are tired, make the day smaller.** Berlin is easier after a shower, charged phone and room reset.
